chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Said About Those Who Fear Throwing the Pebbles or Who Add or Reduce the Number

text: 2998 - رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ ذَهَبْتُ أَرْمِي فَإِذَا فِي يَدِي سِتُّ حَصَيَاتٍ فَقَالَ «خُذْ وَاحِدَةً مِنْ تَحْتِ رِجْلَيْكَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2998 - Ali ibn Abi Hamzah narrated from Abu Basir, who said:
"I said to Abu Abdullah (as), 'I went to perform the stoning (Rami), and I found six pebbles in my hand.' He said, 'Take one from beneath your feet.'"
